login_issue.solution: Please clear cache and reset your password.
login_issue.technical_details: Verify authentication logs and check token expiry.
login_issue.business_impact: Login downtime may affect user acquisition metrics.

app_crash.solution: Please reinstall the application and restart your device.
app_crash.technical_details: Check stack trace and memory allocation logs.
app_crash.business_impact: Frequent crashes may impact customer retention.
